parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Backup policy action: 1 enables, 2 stops, and 3 runs the policy immediately

parameters.name: backup_mode
parameters.description: Whether an immediate policy run starts a full backup: 0 does not start one and 1 starts one

parameters.name: is_cloud
parameters.description: Whether the protected resource is in the cloud: true for Elastic Cloud Hosts or false for local customer hosts; this parameter is scheduled for removal, so use sourceType

deprecation.notice: 是否是云上资源(默认true)，true：弹性云主机，false：本地客户主机。推荐使用sourceType参数，该参数后续即将下线

parameters.name: source_type
parameters.description: Product service type: CT-ECS for Elastic Cloud Hosts, CT-DPS for bare-metal physical hosts, or CT-LS for local customer hosts

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID

parameters.name: policy_name
parameters.description: Backup policy name

parameters.name: direct_type
parameters.description: Backup directory rule: 0 includes all directories, 1 uses specified directories, and 2 uses advanced rules

parameters.name: backup_file_info
parameters.description: Backup file JSON object: dirs and files contain at most 10 paths of at most 4095 characters; dirs is required unless all directories are selected; rule is required for advanced directory rules, where 0 includes all files, 1 includes files, and 2 excludes files

parameters.name: backup_period_info
parameters.description: Backup schedule JSON object: rule is 0 hourly, 1 daily, 2 weekly, or 3 monthly; day is [0, 6] for weekly schedules (0 Sunday and 1-6 Monday-Saturday) or [1, 31] for monthly schedules, and is required for weekly or monthly rules; hour is [0,23] and required except for hourly rules

parameters.name: backup_retention_info
parameters.description: Backup retention JSON object: type is -1 permanent, 1 days, 2 weeks, 3 months, or 4 years; value is required unless retention is permanent; hasConf enables advanced retention and conf sets day, week, month, and year counts

parameters.name: backup_full_info
parameters.description: Periodic full-backup JSON object: backupMode is 0 disabled or 1 enabled, and incrementNum sets the number of incremental backups between full backups

parameters.name: backup_limit_qos_info
parameters.description: Backup rate-limit JSON object: isLimitQos is 0 disabled or 1 enabled; each rateLimits item requires start in [0,23], stop in [1,24], and uploadMb in [1,9999] MB

parameters.name: is_cloud
parameters.description: Whether the protected resource is in the cloud: true for Elastic Cloud Hosts or false for local customer hosts; this parameter is scheduled for removal, so use sourceType

deprecation.notice: 是否是云上资源(默认true)，true：弹性云主机，false：本地客户主机。推荐使用sourceType参数，该参数后续即将下线

parameters.name: source_type
parameters.description: Product service type: CT-ECS for Elastic Cloud Hosts, CT-DPS for bare-metal physical hosts, or CT-LS for local customer hosts

examples: ctyun cbr policy create --policy-name test-20240607-01 --instance-id 1f56ccee-1f72-5243-9e3a-03f4d345f249 --storage-id a154100d-5f4b-4621-82f0-d04896903416 --direct-type 2 --backup-period-info '{"rule":2,"day":1,"hour":0}' --backup-retention-info '{"type":-4,"value":30,"hasConf":true,"conf":{"day":1,"week":0,"month":1,"year":100}}' --backup-file-info '{"dirs":["D:\\"],"files":["/dev/app.py"],"rule":0}'

parameters.description: Backup host IDs; separate multiple IDs with ","

parameters.description: Page number

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum results per page; cannot exceed 50

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID

parameters.name: target_instance_id
parameters.description: Target host ID; omit to restore to the original host

parameters.name: target_dir
parameters.description: Restore target directory; omit to restore to the original directory; a missing path is created automatically

parameters.name: existing_file_mode
parameters.description: Existing-file handling mode: 0 overwrites a same-name file, 1 skips it, and 2 retains the latest version

parameters.name: function_type
parameters.description: Restore function type: 0 includes all files, 1 restores specified paths, and 2 excludes specified paths

parameters.name: file_list
parameters.description: Paths to include or exclude; required when function type is 1 or 2, with at most 10 paths

parameters.name: include_system_dirs
parameters.description: Whether an original-directory restore includes system directories

parameters.description: Whether the protected resource is in the cloud: true for Elastic Cloud Hosts or false for local customer hosts; this parameter is scheduled for removal, so use sourceType

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Backup storage repository name containing only letters, digits, and hyphens; it cannot start with a digit or hyphen or end with a hyphen

parameters.name: capacity
parameters.description: Backup storage repository capacity from 100 to 1024000 GB

parameters.name: cycle_type
parameters.description: Subscription cycle type: year or month

parameters.name: cycle_count
parameters.description: Subscription cycle count: 1 to 11 months or 1 to 3 years

parameters.name: multi_az
parameters.description: Whether to deploy across availability zones: 0 for a single AZ or 1 for multiple AZs; available only in supported regions

examples: ctyun cbr storage create --name storage-name --capacity 300 --cycle-type month --cycle-count 6
